description: Geoapify provides map, geocoding, routing, places, boundaries, and other geospatial services built around OpenStreetMap and related location data. Its products are aimed at developers adding maps and location intelligence to applications and websites.
summary: Geoapify exposes HTTP integration surfaces for its location platform APIs at api.geoapify.com plus map-tile/style endpoints at maps.geoapify.com; both use a Geoapify-issued API key passed as the `apiKey` query parameter. No public GraphQL API, MCP server, or CLI was found.
